subcodes.first_line: O Son of My Name! Hearken unto My call from around the Throne, for it draweth thee unto a station wherein no circumstances shall grieve thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن اسمی اسمع ندائی من حول عرش انه یجذبک الی مقام لا تحزنک شونات
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @presence of; reunion with God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
